channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: TMA cautions on heavy rains and flood risks in coastal regions
item.description: The Tanzania Meteorological Authority (TMA) has issued a warning to communities in several coastal regions about the potential for heavy rainfall and flooding. According to TMA, areas including Lindi,...

item.title: Michaela Gosselin earns bronze in women's slalom, marking Canada's 200th Winter Paralympic medal
item.description: On Day 8 of the Milano-Cortina 2026 Paralympics, Michaela Gosselin of Collingwood, Ontario, earned bronze in the women's slalom standing event, marking her first Paralympic podium and the historic 200...

item.title: Indian Railways to Launch Faster and Modern Ticketing System
item.description: Indian Railways is all set to replace its four-decade-old ticketing software with a new, faster, and more scalable reservation system. For years, passengers have faced frustration with the existing e-...

item.title: Mosiuoa 'Terror' Lekota’s Role in Rebuilding the ANC During Natal’s Turbulent Times
item.description: Mosiuoa 'Terror' Lekota played a pivotal role in restoring the African National Congress (ANC) structures in South Africa’s Natal province during the volatile period following the unbanning of the ANC...

item.title: How Crude Oil is Refined into Everyday Fuels and Products
item.description: As tensions escalate between the US, Israel, and Iran, the closure of the Strait of Hormuz and attacks on Middle Eastern oil facilities have driven Brent crude prices above US$100 per barrel, impactin...

item.title: Alexa Ilacad shines with a comedic tribute to Rufa Mae Quinto on YFSF 2026 Week 12
item.description: During Week 12 of Your Face Sounds Familiar (YFSF) 2026, Alexa Ilacad delivered a standout performance by impersonating the comedic style of Rufa Mae Quinto. Her act was not only humorous but also cap...

item.title: Mercedes-Benz explores partnership with Geely to boost vehicle development in China
item.description: Mercedes-Benz has reportedly held preliminary discussions with Chinese automaker Geely as it looks to deepen collaboration between the two companies. According to Bloomberg, which cited sources famili...

item.title: Oburu Oginga Opens New Nairobi Headquarters to Boost ODM Influence Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: Oburu Oginga, leader of the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM), has officially launched a new political headquarters in Nairobi along Riverside Drive, marking a strategic move to strengthen his position...

item.title: The Right to Self-Defence in International Conflicts
item.description: Dis article by Owei Lakemfa dey talk about di hypocrisy wey dey among some international leaders wey dey based for Western Europe. E highlight how since February 28, 2026, Iran don dey suffer serious ...

item.title: US Embassy in Baghdad hit by missile causing damage to helipad and air defence system
item.description: On Saturday, a missile strike targeted the United States Embassy located in Baghdad’s heavily fortified Green Zone, causing visible smoke from the compound. According to an Iraqi security source, the ...

item.title: Deputy President Mashatile honours Mosiuoa Lekota as principled and fearless leader
item.description: The late Mosiuoa “Terror” Lekota, former COPE president, passed away at 77 and was laid to rest in Bloemfontein. His funeral service drew cabinet ministers, former ministers, and provincial leaders, r...

item.title: Woman arrested following death of newborn in Westminster
item.description: A 43-year-old woman has been arrested on suspicion of murder after a newborn baby girl died following a fall from a height in central London. The incident occurred at a flat on Horseferry Road, Westmi...

item.title: Canada to Release 24 Million Barrels of Oil to Support Global Energy Stability
item.description: Canada has announced that it will release 24 million barrels of oil from its reserves to support an international effort coordinated by the International Energy Agency (IEA). This move comes as global...

item.title: Japan Approves First iPS Cell-Based Products for Treating Heart Failure and Parkinson's Disease
item.description: Japan's Ministry of Health, Labor and Welfare has granted conditional approval to two innovative regenerative medicine products derived from induced pluripotent stem (iPS) cells, marking the world's f...

item.title: Kenyan Woman Exposes Househelp’s Theft Caught on Home CCTV
item.description: A Kenyan woman named Dorah recently discovered that her househelp had been stealing from her home, despite her treating the domestic worker like family. The incident came to light after reviewing foot...

item.title: UK Parliamentarians Ask Prime Minister To Raise Human Rights Concerns With President Tinubu During His State Visit
item.description: British lawmakers don dey call on Prime Minister Keir Starmer make he face Nigerian President Bola Tinubu with wahala wey concern di killing of Christians for Naija. Dis one dey happen as Tinubu land ...

item.title: Armed Attack in Plateau Leaves 20 Security Officers and Vigilantes Dead
item.description: For real matter, na heavy wahala happen for Plateau State as gunmen don kill at least 20 security personnel and local vigilantes for Garga area, Kanam Local Government. The incident happen around 4pm ...

item.title: Trump administration and Iran remain unwilling to engage in ceasefire negotiations
item.description: The Trump administration has declined attempts by Middle Eastern allies to begin diplomatic negotiations aimed at ending the war with Iran, which erupted following a major U.S.-Israeli air strike two ...

item.title: 37 Former POGO Workers Arrested for Large-Scale Bank Fraud in Laguna
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Authorities have arrested 37 individuals in San Pedro, Laguna for their involvement in a large-scale scamming operation. The suspects, former employees of Philippine Offshore Gam...

item.title: Federal review of electric vehicle tax exemption raises concerns for outer-suburban families
item.description: The federal government is reviewing the fringe benefits tax exemption for electric vehicles, which could see the Electric Car Discount phased out. Introduced in 2022, the discount has been claimed by ...
